neighborhoods.name: Downtown Skowhegan
neighborhoods.description: Historic mill town center on the Kennebec River with renovated Main Street and community arts
neighborhoods.character: Mill town reviving, river, community arts

housing.predominantType: Victorian houses, apartments, and older homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Skowhegan. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Norridgewock
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent rural town with Kennebec River access, farmland, and small-town community
neighborhoods.character: Rural river town, farms, small community

housing.predominantType: Farm houses, rural homes, and modest properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Skowhegan's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Madison / Anson
neighborhoods.description: Northern mill towns with very affordable housing, outdoor recreation, and paper mill heritage
neighborhoods.character: Mill towns, very affordable, outdoor recreation

housing.predominantType: Modest houses, mobile homes, and affordable properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Fairfield / Oakland
neighborhoods.description: Southern communities near Waterville with better services, Colby College influence, and lake access
neighborhoods.character: Near Waterville, college influence, lake access
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
